raw: May 1 through October 31 : Each pass provides free museum admission for 1 family (2 Adults and children 17 & under) per day. November 24 through February: 50% discount on admission to Labrie Family Skate at Puddle Dock Pond. Please note: The museum is closed during this time period. Free admission for up to 4 individuals to: -Baby Animals: Heritage Breeds at the Banke (April 27-May 5, 2024) -Ghosts on the Banke (last weekend in October) -Candlelight Stroll (Fridays, December 8 & 15, 5-9 PM; Saturdays, December 2, 9, 16, 2023, 5-9 PM; Sundays, December 3, 10, & 17, 2023, 4-8 PM; excludes the Member Preview Night) 10% off purchases at Pickwick's at the Banke (Museum gift shop) and merchandise in the Lawrence J. Yerdon Visitors Center.
